textPlain: > this update disrupts mouse and keyboard functionality within the Windows Recovery Environment (WinRE), making them unresponsive> Early last week, Microsoft accidentally broke the Windows Media Creation Tool (MCT) just a day ahead of Windows 10's end-of-life.
